data: Silver egg/circle UFO floated for minutes, then shot upward and seemed to camouflage into the sky.
A diffused light followed by a line of little bright dots flew slowly above our heads.
Flashing red and green lights in sky, object not moving. Suddenly zipped off to the left at a high speed.
Bright green orb fell straight to ground from clouds at a constant, fast speed (lasted for 1-3 seconds)
Strange location and appearance of a large square or rectangular shaped light.
A blurred orb in front of a line of light
It made zero noise.  I saw the tip come over the house followed by two more lights.
Metal cylinder shaped object that kept moving west and east with a white vapor tail
I believe I saw a triangle leave the atmosphere
Me and my friend Henri where about 20 feet away from eachother and all of the sudden a violent gust of wind flys above us Henri saw it.
A big black orb floating in the sky. Windy day, but object would appear to hover then continue movement in alternating directions
A light moving at changing speeds not in a linear direction as a satellite
Thought it was a shooting star but never changed color and changed direction with a clear fire trail behind it.
White light crossing night sky followed by smaller white light
I was heading back to work from the 5star down the road and spotted it pulsing watched it until it was directly overtop of me
Large transparent reflective sphere moving slowly. Witnessed for 3 seconds then it disappeared.
Big black object came out of the clouds and stayed stationary
Cylindrical rotating slowly. No wings. Extremely shiny metal that brightly reflected sun. Reflection appears like a light.
Path was north to south. I thought it was changing direction. Went behind a branch and then lost it
Unidentified object returns nightly at sunset and stays between 400 and 600 feet and drifts around the property before leaving.
Green orbs darting around in the sky too fast for any aircraft following in trail
It was stationary until I looked at it, then quickly moved across the big dipper - diagonal line up to the right, shrank and was gone
Appeared as 3 glowing cube-shaped sections side-by-side with no gaps, forming one long rectangle.
Visible in sky the night prior. Was in same spot this evening. Began to move, then vanish.
Coming from the north to the S/SE. I was thinking of whatever was up there when it appeared having seen it before.
The craft has defined sides and edges in the first image, then a longer tube shape
Me and my cousin were coming down starling Ave and all of a sudden Roger said what's that ?! There in the sky was a round metallic disc
A long string of white lights moving kinda slow across the sky
The triangle came overhead slowly with light on each tip the sped away.
Clear sky, light moved fast, larger than a satellite, lower altitude, moved erratically, seemed to be jumping from place to place.
3 giant white ping pong balls orbiting each other in a perfect equilateral triangle. Crossed the entire valley in seconds - no trails
Single white light hovering near mountain, blinking completely off and erratically, moving horizontally, then vanished.
Cylinder object, super weird movement going 2x the speed of a airplane, it was spinning and such, froze, turned dark and shot up
For dark hexagon shaped objects flying over my yard south from Reno over Carson and then made a sharp left as if heading towards Dayton
Single white pinpoint flash, instantaneous, no repeat, no navigation lights, stationary origin point
Bright flashing red light flying back and forth (north and south) above the ocean. Then it flew north out of view.
A bright yellow light. Was moving very slow and looked like it was hidden behind cloud.
Sometimes 3 at a time fading and reappearing at different spots 20 to 30° above north horizon
The security camera took a short video of 2 objects following each other
It seemed to be rotating clockwise with no alert pulse like a plane just light
It was brighter then the sun in my front yard
Constant sighting in a rural area of ​​Cusco, Peru
Witness and video recorded a orb flying low and being trailed/escorted by a single blackhawk military helicopter.
Very high altitude, below upper thin white cloud layer, perfect equilateral triangle, no reflection, mat black
Pewter colored craft with window panels and projectiles sticking out in several directions, looked like a bagel with a doughnut on top
Saw several 1-ft lights 5–6 ft off ground near Sedona/Cottonwood; one shot ~100 ft upward instantly, nearly causing a crash.
I thought it was a large bird like owl at first. Then I noticed it was higher in the sky . No noise and just floated
Numerous lights were observed to be emerging from the region immediately around and within Orions Belt in the western sky until it set.
I saw something strange in the night sky..
Unknown shape it was to shiny and reflective to see the exact shape it was there and then vanished quickly
At dusk, an oval object with two star-like lights moved west to east, then vanished where aircraft details should’ve been visible.
Flashing white lights in a rotating manner right above the trees
Saw what I thought was a star but it started moving towards a stationary star. once it was close they both left together
Invisible, transparent, without visible structure, in the shape of two pyramids joined at their bases, flat tips. Movement outside of p
2 lights in close proximity, moving very fast with no sound
2 triangle shaped craft hover then shoot away
Bright orbs appearing & disappearing. Moving slowly, not in a line, appeared & disappeared in multiple locations
Immediately after starlink train passed I saw a square shaped light moving erratically
From my front yard, observed a bright light cranking across the sky heading north toward Canada
Saw a craft that resembles what would be the same shape as Saturn, seemed like a goldfish, yellow glowing light was circling around it
One larger circle light or object plus three smaller ones that flew in a triangle
Group of 4-5 heading from East to West, somewhat clustered, followed by 2 more individual orange balls spaced about 1 min apart.
Started as a star before showing full form, did a lazy C curve before flashing back cross the sky and disappearing suddenly
Looking northwest, the sphere was going south, and changed direction to southeast.
Large white glowing triangle shape floating low in the sky
It was a nice night tour when all off a sudden a big bang was heard and a tiny gray star looking thing came blasting low over the water
Objects appeared in 2 separate photographs of a total of 7 shot
The shape looked similar to a normal car shape that we would think of. Main body was black and was lighting bright with yellow glare.
About 10 to 15 moving in formation stopping and going back. No airplane that I know does that.
Craft or drone was cigar shaped very hard to see color of it. There were white lights on each end of it. It was traveling very fast.
2 silver tubes with green blue light coming from end, flew 60 feet off ground,traveled over Defense Logistics Agency then over Whitehal
Not normal movement of any planes or helicopters. Craft seemed to stop and continue and move side to side suddenly
Large circular craft(s) estimated 750 ft off ground
It was seen moving fast through the sky and would disappear fast and then come back and also was splitting and changing colors
I went to take out the family dog. I had looked up and seen what at first seemed like two stars. Then they started moving.
Went to my window to look outside beacuse it's nice and there was this silver craft shot off into the blue sky
3-4 red orbs in triangular formation in sky
Cylinder object, super weird movement going 2x that of a plane, it was spinning and wobbling, froze turned dark and shot up
Was ordering lunch at the iceberg in Gridley california. Looked over in the sky towards Casa Lupe saw metallic disc in the air moving
It was a small but mostly wide and large if seen from closer it was a non terrestrial object pointing its light at me and then left
Silent house-sized bell disc, flat bottom, domed top, square cap, single top light, 8 rotating lights in triangle flash pattern, ~1mph,
Large black triangle UAP flying low over city. No sound and no lights.
Weird shaped object darting across the sky in daylight.
I was staring at the sky and I could see a lot of stars. A few seconds later 3 of the stars moved at an incredible speed
The UAF was moving from the south to the north. It would move in a straight line then disappear then reappear exactly where I first saw
I was looking up at the night sky, and I red and green orb flew past super quickly over someone's house.
I saw a diamond shaped craft in the sky.
Round bright white orb traveled straight through blue sky.
Was coming from my apartment to parking lot when I saw this green light that would flash then a few times it would turn red
Top were 2 big bright shiny orbs with a forming V shape connection, UAP was vertical, the 2 lines that formed the v were a bit silver
White circles coming out of one spot in the sky, lighting up bright then moving fast before disappearing. Constantly doing it
Disc-shaped and triangular UFOs observed hovering and maneuvering over Wasilla, AK from approximately 1:40–3:15 AM.
If what I saw was satellites, I have never seen so many in such a small time frame.
1 or more lights will appear, then immediately travel east & disappear in 5 seconds.
I was walking outside watching the stars and i see about 4-5 white lights going in a circle like formation then zoomed off
Multiple amber lights traveling South at 11,000'-15,000' feet above the hills between Los Banos HWY 152 Pacheco Pass and Hollister Ca.
Twelve green dots flying in a triangular pattern
I saw 4 distinct orbs hovering for 3 or 4 minutes. Over time, the far left orb slowly drifted away on its own, then each one after that
Stationary bright “star” flashed, rose left, shrank into space; witness links it to past sightings and possible abduction.
30 foot circle metal orb flying as fast as a plane directly overhead, passing through clouds. The orb zigzagged around, not a balloon
Sphere moving fast from West to East
We saw a silver very shiny shaped object moving at great speed in straight line to north west.
It popped out of nowhere, began slowly moving towards the SouthEast and began moving rapidly, zigzagging then disappearing
The disks swooped down while i was walking outside of the pool to miller fence and started shining lights back and forth at each other
The orbs were not stars because they were not aligned and they were Northwest, and then they disappeared
I seen like five lights that are red and blue, moving slowly then they like worp speed out of the sky
Second night of sightings. Same beginning one Central craft begins circling erratic movements disappears reappears with multiple other
Orbs moving on various headings changing altitude and speeds at times stopping mid air, vanishing and reappearing single, pairs, groups
Several lights moving that look like stars
Orbs moving in the sky disappearing and reappearing repeatedly
Observed object was white light, then blue, then red; recorded object white tic tac
Object was round at first and rolling (not spinning). then long point came out of side, then turned round again.
Lights pulsed and the craft stayed in the air for over 45 minutes
Object looked like an orange glow stick with dark lines perpendicular. Like windows, I ran toward it to get a pic before disappearing
Unidentified objected, perfectly round, hovering, black
Unidentified orange lights observed over Hollister hills moving in clusters with irregular, silent motion for several hours overnight.
The greys were standing in the woods. The one in front squatted down then stood up & lifted its hand. There was lots of light
Observation of High-Altitude Orange Orbs Exhibiting Extreme Manoeuvrability
Stationary row of bright red lights were flashing in a pattern.
I was in my backyard, I looked up and noticed a cigar shaped object flying the the sky, rotating randomly, and keeping the same height.
At distance it would have been very large, approximately a football field, round, and rotating and over end
A bright light circled around my neighborhood, with varied speeds.
Disc/triangular object flashed into the sky with lights under it. Flames surrounded it and it zipped away.
A drone, or some type of aircraft or something bright landed just beyond the paper company tree line just out of my backyard
I was in the backyard and I looked up I saw a light pan across the sky going from west to east then disappearing
Low flying plane-like craft. Omnidirectional, completely still. Alternating from white light while stationary to blinking red/green
When I was taken outside floating I saw all 3 figures and a round object in the sky above with a light looking down at me an floated up
A light in the sky which disappeared and reappeared, zig zagged across the sky and moved large distances across sky in seconds
Yo-yo shaped object with ring-like structure; rapid, zig-zag movement and circular flight pattern.
Uber/Lyft driver saw bright UAP near airport 3 times; hovered, vanished, and once rapidly dropped near treetops.
Out of my window seat going in a northern direction I saw the UFO going south at a very high rate of speed
Small greenish dot blinking and moving at a speed that I've never seen.
Saw a orb that was moving in a strange pattern
Eight small metallic rectangular objects moving upward before disappearing
At first there was one craft/light then it became 2 flying off fast without any sound
There were about 10-12 objects, I thought they were white in color but then I realized that they were spheres that were glowing.
While stopped at a red light on the bus i saw a white cigar shaped object it looked frozen then it moved in an unusual way
What I thought was a plane, flew across the sky so fast. It went from having multiple lights to just 2 blue lights. It sonic boomed.
At first the items looked to be a bird until I saw the item hover and then take off so sharply in a very different direction
Circular object with numerous lights moving west over a baseball field where I was sitting, watching the game. Object was brightly lit
Star moving erratically - 1 interacted with the other
5 silent cylindrical objects with bright front and dimmer rear, holding pentagonal formation moving steadily at high altitude.
I was walking home from the Pocono firework show and heard a loud craft through my music
While walking dog, witness saw a silent bright white metallic object with two humps and flat bottom hover slowly, then vanish.
Moving SW curved to SE then back to SW. Very high in clouds and moving against the wind and against the direction of cloud movement.
It was egg shaped with blue lights and some weird terrestrial texture on the bottom
Unusual aircraft with what appears to be almost a segmented tail that looked like exhaust but it was moving almost in a worm like patte
Dark orange colored orb emiting bright light while drifting through the sky before vanishing behind treeline
An unreasonable and rapid movement against gravity.
Traveled silently about 120mph, low flying, steady pace, white glow, no blinking lights
2 exactly vertical from each other. Moved extremely quickly and i struggled to keep the phone on them. Moved very fast
Red and blue flashing lights flying around between houses
The ufo was flashing blue and red, with some strange lighting going up from it. Then it faded away into the sky, was floating
Looking North one came in went south the 2 minutes if not less another and another and another 8 all up over a 20 minute period
Observed a rotating luminous disc-like object hovering in the night sky for several hours.
I saw a bright white form. It appeared as a line into the left of it had several streaks coming off of it
Massive object very long with lit up areas on it
I went outside, heard rumbling, saw a blackhawk, but realized this was out of the ordinary for a few reasons I'll explain below
It was traingular in the front
Silent aircraft—the visual size of the moon and color of the sun with square side panels—crossed the clear night sky in seconds.
This is the same ufo i reported last time i contacted you, it behaved the same but out in space.
It flew around the forest near my house for a couple of mins and then dipped.
2 UFO low, hovering over Livingston Bay. Both vanished unexpectidly
Dark matte, irregular craft appeared overhead, flew fast and silently west to east, looped, with sunlit ridges visible against sky.
At first itseemd to hold still, and then accelerated so fast it got lost in the firmament
Witnessed a large black object with what appeared to be wings.
Very shiny almost like a mirror, hovering in place, small, and randomly faded away and disappeared
Giant oval, cream colored and perfectly smooth without any seams or rivets slowly moved over the peavine mountain
A point in space was moving in a specific trajectory that out classes current US aircraft
I saw what I thought was ISS moving from the west toward southeast. Bright yellowish white large as Venus is tonight.
3 dark objects rotating around themselves moving slowly across sky
After dropping off my daughter at bus stop as I came into my community I noticed this in the sly. The smoke zig zags all over then this
Bright neon glowing orb the size of a softball hovered near trees on the playground, giving a strong sense of being watched.
We saw a triangle craft come from the SW and made a sharp J turn and flew straight N over us towards Ben Lomond mountain.
Bright light changing trajectory at high speed and suddenly stopping
Series of light appearing and reappearing almost look like flares at first
In bright daylight, white round object moving from East north east to west south west approx 20k ft at high rate of speed.
5 fireballs falling from the sky with smoke trail following.
Pale pink, distant light was moving fast through sky then disappeared
A silent chevron or V-shaped object with rows of pinprick-like dim lights formed on its "wings" was spotted in Rialto, California.
Disk Shaped Craft in Thunderstorm - Grand Island NY
Cigar shaped with white glow nodes
White spherical object near Qaisumah airport, moving up and down then spinning and tumbling. No wings, no exhaust trail. Filmed on cam.
I saw a disk moving in the sky lower than planes and higher then Drones or birds.
Flying white orb seen moving from west to east, seen by the entire islands of Trinidad and Tobago
Strange bright white light over Central Trinidad, West Indies
Large triangle shaped, bright white yellow light moved in straight line overhead. Steady light with no flashing. Then light when out.
This craft was slightly above the clouds with the four white lights dimly shining through and flew across the sky in 5 seconds.
A high-altitude matte grey ellipsoid/orb moving slowly, curving smoothly, lacking aircraft features, then vanishing.
It was flying horizontally, then began to rotate on it's axis irregularly, then disappeared as it flew behind the treeline.
Partially cloaking itself against blue sky. It was following a white plane steadily across the sky then disappeared behind clouds
A rotating cube over Patrick’s Air Force base. It was turning and rotating non stop.
100+ amber, reddish orange lights heading northwest and southeast at 10,000' - 40,000' same as may 6 2026 hollister sighting
Lights were blinking, moving in a zigzag pattern, and suddenly disappearing.   There were about 8 or 9 lights.
Floating white ball moving fairly slowly a few minutes I pulled out my camera, but it was invisible on the phone then disapeared
Green orb seen in clouds, stretches and disappears into glowing light
Geometric cut on top, but somewhat disc shaped, sharp edged corners on the top end. It was white, hovering motionless.
Bright Orb Turned Into Triangle Aircraft
Night sky littered with high activity with moving stars
I saw an orb made of liquid mercury and emitting a bright white light. I stayed outside all night filming it right above me.
I looked out my backyard door and saw a bright white light which disappeared immediately as I looked at it
I have observed strange lights around Mt. Shasta for years. On this night I was star gazing and noticed a bright ball of light
We observed two separate objects gliding through the sky like white lights with metal bases like how a flying saucepan is described
I saw this beautiful beaming like a diamond it was just sitting in the sky .
Orb traveled the horizon line, dead stopped, changed direction 180 degrees
Red craft hovering over my deck, would change form and spin really fast, would zig zag around real fast, looked like a hologram
A very bright orange fireball moving in low arc dropping downward.  No tail of debris.
Driving home from Cape Cod we witnessed these what appeared to be crafts hovering, then moving through the sky
Green sphere flying over quebec skyline disapeared into the clouds.
Last Saturday in Wokingham, RG40 1UE, I witnessed a UAP sighting. I managed to take several pictures.
Very large bright light rapidly changing speeds and direction
Triangle shaped, 3 lights in a nonstandard pattern. Seemed to disappear as soon as I noticed it, in ten seconds was gone.
An orange-white glowing orb repeatedly vanished and reappeared over Washington Heights for 5 to 10 minutes
My kids come in scared said they saw something weird in sky, my husband and cousin all went out and watched for a hour. It still going
“Moving star”, satellite like lights moving in the North/Northwest Sky
Diamond-Shaped Object Over St. Pete, FL
Saw a uap that initially looked like a rectangle white in color that morphed several times but at last sight was flat diamond
Formation of 3 objects in formation, like pinheads.
Large yellow orb, hovering before either rotating or shrinking and then instantaneously accelerating
A orange circular object that was looping above a house
Purple orb like object projecting an energy like reaction on a repetitive like pattern
Featureless Silver Ish item silently moving rapidly across the sky north north east heading no sound whatsoever
Near Ground Level, Perfect Triangle with 3 Circular Lights, One in each end, didn't emit sound, flew away gliding into the sky.
The objects were slowly rotating while staying basically stationary.
The details are unclear, two black dots flew above me when I was filming the beginning of the supercell, I filmed in 4K
It was a red light high above the buildings and was stationary i turned around and it was gone
Looked to be floating above water. Unnaturally bright and reflecting across huge distance of water.
There were two lights in the sky to the west of our house. The lights would dim and disappear only to reappear in a different location.
Star-like orb moving fast and in different directions before it appears to fly towards the south east
A large perfect Sphere of yellow light crossed the entire sky over me
White ovoid disc near or over Telluride airport seen toward NNW from 3 miles distant then moved slowly to NNE becoming small white dot.
Daughter told my oldest son to look in the sky, and he didn't recognize it, so he started recording with his cellphone.
Saw a green light with a black ring. moved fast as shooting star, going NE, then it redirected and fled S, at fighter jet speeds
We have been seeing these orbs for awhile,its as if they are interacting with us. The movements are impossible for any known creations.
Seen one at a time, occasionally 2, for an hour coming out of a specific area and disappearing after about 20 sec of travel
Dumbbell shaped object slowly moving back and forth and spinning
The first craft looked like an orange ball about the size of a golf Ball,, the other small object looked like an white sphere
UFO in a triangular shape, flying low and slowly, with weak lights and a bit transparent.
Large green orb moving west to east near I10 on about 90 degree trajectory. As it reached lower anltitude it turned red.
Marble size black sphere with goldish area silently circling me
Fly sideways at 45 degree angle no rotors like a drone.
It lit up rough in front of me as I was driving, huge, was spotlighting the ground then disappeared or went dim
The shape and colour of the object was completely different.
I watched 3 "stars" in the shape of triangle moving in unison
I was observing the sky looking at the high altitude passenger aircraft, when I noticed a sphere near it.
It flew by in the sky
These come and go, and more than one. Thrusting , Moving , flashing , interacting . Blinking , roundish , with rotation ,
From inside my moving car, I saw a giant, saucer-shaped object hovering in the air with a bright light, like a camera flash.
Brighton yellow orbs lights hovering after midnight near willow run airport, no sounds, too slow to be a plane or helicopter.
Bright, silent spherical UAP over Survey Park, Kolkata. It displayed stable white brightness with no blinking navigation lights.
We saw a black equilateral triangle with one white light and two red lights. Regular (cessna planes?) were cornering it in the sky.
We did not see a craft, we saw blinking lights, right outside our bedroom window, accompanied by loud popping sounds.
Two objects over Ganja: one stationary, one sharp L-shaped craft that reversed direction into storm clouds.
It was a disk top half grey, lower half was a super shiny chrome. Sun was reflecting off the chrome. It didn’t move. Then it was gone.
I really can’t describe the shape but it was black and moved smoothly and fast. Above the planes.
At least three blue lights attached to some sort of silent aircraft
There might have been more than four, they appeared, disappeared and reappeared seemingly out of nowhere.
Bright white fuzzy cigar shaped object.
Object engaged in complex yet chaotic atmospheric maneuvers then disappeared into the ocean. Kept pulsing red white and blue light.
Me and my friend were outside around midnight of may 31 and we saw a object moving at impossible speeds
Silver orb/sphere flying over Grand Canyon
Fast moving ball of light spotted above mountain line facing north traveling west and changing direction east before dimming out.
I was out on the washout side of folly beach South Carolina around 4 am when I looked over the water and started to notice strangeness.
Big 50m large object seen in the sky with brilliant and shiny lights.
Appeared overhead but left no trail then suddenly exposed itself
